## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Transform your business details into professional video ads in minutes. No design skills needed. Create stunning Facebook, Instagram &amp; TikTok ads instantly.

### How It Works
https://example.com/how-it-works
Discover how ReadyToGo&#39;s automated video maker transforms templates into publication-ready ads. Choose, customize, and launch your social media campaigns fast.

### Pricing
https://example.com/pricing
Skip expensive video production costs. Get unlimited access to our Instagram ad video generator tool and create professional ads for less than one agency video.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to automate your video ad creation? Contact our team to learn how ReadyToGo helps small businesses create TikTok ads and dominate social media advertising.
